compiled_state.title: Add confidence signal instruction to task-execution.md
compiled_state.author: Main
compiled_state.description:
## Description
Add CONFIDENT/UNCERTAIN confidence signal instructions to the sub-agent prompt template (task-execution.md) so implementation agents emit a structured confidence signal in their output.

## TDD Requirement
RED test from task d442-938b must be written first. This task makes that test pass (GREEN).

## Implementation
Modify plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/task-execution.md to add a section instructing sub-agents to:
1. Emit CONFIDENT as a line in their output when they have high confidence in task completion
2. Emit UNCERTAIN:<reason> when they lack confidence (ambiguous task description, missing context, codebase state doesn't match expectations, etc.)
3. The signal should appear alongside STATUS: and FILES_MODIFIED: lines in the output
4. Follow the contract format defined in plugins/dso/docs/contracts/confidence-signal.md

## Files to Modify
- plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/task-execution.md
- .test-index (remove RED markers once test passes)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] task-execution.md contains confidence signal instructions
  Verify: grep -q 'CONFIDENT\|UNCERTAIN' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/task-execution.md
- [ ] RED test from d442-938b now passes
  Verify: python3 -m pytest tests/skills/test_task_execution_template.py -k confidence
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py

comments.body: AC amendment (gap analysis — implicit_assumption): The CONFIDENT/UNCERTAIN signal must be added as a new line in the step 9 report output block (alongside STATUS:, FILES_MODIFIED:, TESTS:, etc.), not just as a general instruction elsewhere in the template. Use exact field name and format from the contract (e96c-6269). Without this, the sprint orchestrator has no reliable parsing target.
comments.author: Main

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Code patterns understood ✓ — RED tests from d442-938b not present in file; will write them as part of this task
